jobs.title: Set up Asana Automate flow: Asana Timesheets → Excel/SharePoint for payroll (small pilot)
jobs.description: I need a simple, reliable automation for a 15-user pilot project. Pull approved time entries from Asana on a scheduled basis and write the data into an existing Excel table in SharePoint / OneDrive. Use Microsoft Power Automate (preferred). Provide a short handover guide. Please apply with confirmation you have done similar Asana to Excel/Power Automate flows before.

jobs.title: AI Engineer Needed for Multi-Agent AI Platform, LLM Integration & Production-Scale Automation
jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced AI Engineer to design and develop a complex AI platform. Design and implement multi-agent AI workflows, integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, open-source models), build RAG pipelines with vector databases. Strong experience with Python and AI frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex). When applying, please include architecture examples or case studies.

jobs.title: Setup Microsoft Copilot & Claude Agents for Professional Services Practice
jobs.description: We are seeking a practical and reliable freelancer to guide us on an hourly basis via remote screen share. You will help us set up Microsoft Copilot for our business email and assist in building basic agents and automations for our daily tasks using both Copilot and Claude. No real client data will be used; we build and test every automation using fake dummy data.

jobs.title: Microsoft Fabric / Power BI data engineer — multi-entity financial reporting
jobs.description: I'm looking for a Microsoft Fabric / Power BI data engineer to build a centralized financial reporting platform. Six separate QuickBooks Online companies with similar but not identical charts of accounts. Automatically consolidate the data, map accounts to a standardized reporting chart, integrate budgets, and create executive dashboards with MTD/YTD, Budget vs. Actual, and Prior Year reporting.

jobs.title: AI System Builders for internal Workflow Automation
jobs.description: We are trying to make our daily work less manual. A lead comes in from a form, email, or CRM. The data is sent to ChatGPT/OpenAI which creates a clean summary, category, or reply. You should be comfortable with OpenAI API, ChatGPT prompts, Zapier or Make.com, webhooks, Google Sheets, and API connections.
